channel.title: Web-Server on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Server on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Nginx vs Caddy vs Traefik: Best Self-Hosted Web Server 2026
item.description: When you self-host anything — a blog, a homelab, a SaaS product, or an internal dashboard — you need something to serve traffic. That something is a web server or reverse proxy. In 2026, the three most compelling options for self-hosters are Nginx, Caddy, and Traefik. Each has a fundamentally different philosophy, and choosing the right one depends on what you value most.
